case_title: ACQUISITION CO., INC. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO VS. ANSER USA INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-08-2017 CONTINUED TO APR-19-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
